upload.photoSizeHint: JPEG, PNG, WebP, or HEIC — large photos are resized in your browser; up to {maxMb} MB per upload.
upload.photoTooLarge: This photo is too large. Maximum size is {maxMb} MB.
upload.photoSourceTooLarge: This file is too large to open in the browser (about {maxMb} MB max). Try another photo.
upload.photoStillTooLarge: We could not shrink this photo below {maxMb} MB. Try a different image.
upload.photoOptimizeFailed: We could not process this image. Try a JPEG or PNG.
upload.photoRawNotSupported: We couldn’t read this RAW (DNG) file. Export a JPEG or HEIF from your Photos app, or use the camera’s standard (non-RAW) mode, then try again.
upload.photoInvalidType: Please choose a JPEG, PNG, WebP, or HEIC image.

hero.venue: WGBC Battle Ground — open in Maps
hero.venueLinkAria: Open venue location in Google Maps in a new tab

schedule.title: Schedule
schedule.subtitle: How the day unfolds
schedule.emphasisBadgeAria: Main moment on the schedule — the timeline line is stronger from this point onward.
schedule.previewNotice: The full schedule will appear here soon — during and after the celebration you’ll see the full timeline.

dresscode.title: Dress code
dresscode.subtitle: Soft pastels and natural tones — please avoid white or blue.
dresscode.notYourColor: We would prefer a different shade

story.title: Our story
story.subtitle: A little about us
story.vowsLead: On {date}, we will say our vows surrounded by the people who shaped our path. We cannot wait to celebrate with you.
story.previewNotice: The full story will appear here soon — during and after the celebration you’ll be able to read it here.

rsvp.title: RSVP
rsvp.subtitle: Please respond by {deadline}
rsvp.successAttend: Thank you! We can't wait to see you 🎉
rsvp.successDecline: We're sorry you can't join us. Thanks for letting us know 🤍
rsvp.error: Something went wrong. Please reach out to us directly.

notifyFailed.admin: Your RSVP was saved, but we couldn't notify the hosts. Please contact us directly.
notifyFailed.guest: Your RSVP was saved, but we couldn't send the confirmation email. We still have your response — reach out if you need anything.

companions.heading: Names of your additional guests
companions.hint: We’ll save a separate guest profile for each person. The confirmation email is sent only to the address you entered above.

rsvp.previewNotice: RSVP isn’t open here yet. It will be available during and after the celebration — please check back later.

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.subtitle: Share your memories
gallery.dropzone: Drag photos here or click to choose
gallery.maxSize: Large photos are resized in your browser — up to {maxMb} MB per upload
gallery.empty: No photos yet. Be the first!
gallery.uploadSessionRequired: To upload photos, complete RSVP on this site or sign in again with the same name and email you used on the form.
gallery.uploadHintAnonymousHome: To attach a photo, <rsvp>sign in via RSVP</rsvp> on this site or use the sign-in link from your RSVP confirmation email.
gallery.deleteErrorGeneric: Could not delete the photo. Please try again.
gallery.deleteConfirmDescription: It will be removed from the gallery for everyone. This cannot be undone.
gallery.uploadsLockedHint: Gallery uploads are turned off in site settings.
gallery.previewNotice: The shared photo gallery isn’t available yet. It will open during and after the celebration — you’ll be able to browse and upload photos then.
gallery.uploadPreviewNotice: Photo uploads aren’t available yet. They will open during and after the celebration — you can still browse the album when viewing is enabled.

wishes.title: Wishes
wishes.subtitle: Warm words and photos for the couple
wishes.photoGuestSignInHint: Sign in as a guest (RSVP on this site or the link in your email) to attach a photo.
wishes.photoFeatureOff: Photo attachments are turned off in site settings. You can still send your message.
wishes.success: Thank you! Your wish was posted 💌
wishes.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
wishes.empty: No wishes yet. Be the first!
wishes.anonymousSessionHintHome: To add a photo to your wish or post under your RSVP name without retyping it, <rsvp>sign in via RSVP</rsvp> on this site or use the sign-in link from your confirmation email.
wishes.anonymousSessionHintHomeNameOnly: To post under your RSVP name without retyping it, <rsvp>sign in via RSVP</rsvp> on this site or use the sign-in link from your confirmation email.
wishes.photoPreviewNotice: Photo attachments will be available during and after the celebration. You can send your message now.
wishes.previewNotice: Wishes aren’t open yet. You’ll be able to leave messages and photos during and after the celebration.

restore.title: Guest sign-in
restore.subtitle: Use the same name and email you entered on the RSVP form. After signing in you can upload gallery photos and post wishes without retyping your name.
restore.validationSummaryDescription: Fix the fields below and try again.
restore.nameFieldHint: Enter your name as on the RSVP form.
restore.emailFieldHint: Enter a valid email address (same as on RSVP).
restore.rsvpLink: Haven’t RSVP’d yet? Go to the RSVP section.

rehome.title: On the list, but someone else sent the RSVP?
rehome.subtitle: If you are named as an additional guest and another person submitted the RSVP, enter your name as it appears on that list and your own email. We will email you a private sign-in link. This path is only for extra guests, not for the person who filled out the main RSVP.
rehome.switchToRehome: Someone else submitted the RSVP for me
rehome.switchToRestore: Sign in with name and RSVP email instead
rehome.nameLabel: Your name on the guest list
rehome.successToast: If your details matched our list, we sent a message to the address you entered. Check your inbox and spam folder.
rehome.validationSummaryDescription: Fix the fields below and try again.
rehome.nameFieldHint: Use the same spelling as on the party’s RSVP.
rehome.emailFieldHint: Enter a valid email you can open.

guest_session_expired.title: Your guest session has expired
guest_session_expired.description: For security, sign-in from the site expires after a while. Use the same name and email you entered on the RSVP form to sign in again.

guest_session_missing.title: You are not signed in
guest_session_missing.description: To continue as a guest, sign in with the name and email you used on the RSVP form.

guest_session_invalid.title: We could not verify your session
guest_session_invalid.description: Your browser sent a session we no longer recognize. Sign in again with the name and email from your RSVP.

guest_account_missing.title: We could not load your guest profile
guest_account_missing.description: Your session is present but the guest record is missing. Sign in again with the name and email from your RSVP, or use the link from your confirmation email.

restore_credentials_no_match.title: We could not find your RSVP
restore_credentials_no_match.description: Check that your name and email match exactly what you entered when you RSVP’d — spelling, spaces, and the same email address. If you used another address or are not sure, try that one, ask the hosts for a new link, or try again later if you were rate limited.

rate_limited.title: Too many sign-in attempts
rate_limited.description: Please wait {retryAfterSec} seconds before trying again.

request_failed.title: The request did not go through
request_failed.description: Check your connection, then try again. If it keeps happening, refresh the page.

server_error.title: Something went wrong on our side
server_error.description: Please try again in a moment. If the problem continues, refresh the page or contact the hosts.

upload_presign_failed.title: Could not start the upload
upload_presign_failed.description: The server could not prepare your upload. Check your connection and file type, then try again.

upload_r2_failed.title: Could not store the file
upload_r2_failed.description: The upload did not reach storage. Check your network and try again.

upload_confirm_failed.title: Could not save your photo
upload_confirm_failed.description: The file uploaded, but we could not finish saving it. Try uploading again.

upload_no_session.title: Sign in to upload
upload_no_session.description: Sign in with the name and email from your RSVP to upload photos to the gallery.

photo_delete_forbidden.title: You cannot delete this photo
photo_delete_forbidden.description: You can only remove photos you uploaded while signed in with your guest session.

magic_link_invalid.title: This link is invalid or expired
magic_link_invalid.description: The sign-in link may have expired or been copied incorrectly. Open the wedding site and sign in with the name and email from your RSVP, or ask the hosts for a new link.

celebration_not_live.title: Photos open when the celebration begins
celebration_not_live.description: The gallery and wish photos for attending guests are available from the start of the celebration. You can still send a text wish.

guestClaim.invalidTitle: This link is invalid or has expired
guestClaim.invalidDescription: If you already RSVP’d, open the wedding site and sign in with the same name and email you used on the form, or RSVP again from the site.
guestClaim.serverErrorDescription: We couldn’t complete sign-in. Please try again in a moment or open the site and use name + email to restore access.

login.title: Admin sign-in
login.subtitle: Enter the site admin password. Your session is stored in a secure cookie.
login.serverError: Server error. If you manage this site, ensure admin password is set in the database (npm run admin:set-password), migrations are applied, and ADMIN_SESSION_SECRET is set.
login.networkError: Could not reach the server. Try again.
login.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Try again in {seconds, plural, one {# second} other {# seconds}}.
login.rateLimitedGeneric: Too many attempts. Please wait and try again.

dashboard.title: Overview
dashboard.subtitle: Quick links and placeholders until detailed dashboards ship.

guests.title: Guests
guests.subtitle: Guest accounts from the database (one row per person). Filters follow the party RSVP attendance.
guests.loadError: Could not load guests. Try again later.
guests.invalidQuery: Invalid filter in the URL. Open Guests from the menu and choose All, Attending, or Not attending.

gallery.title: Gallery photos
gallery.subtitle: Remove photos from the shared album and storage. This does not check which guest uploaded them.
gallery.loadError: Could not load photos. Try again later.
gallery.empty: No photos in the gallery yet.
gallery.hasMoreHint: Only the most recent photos are listed here. Delete in batches if you need to clear older items.
gallery.countSelected: {count, plural, =0 {None selected} one {# selected} other {# selected}}
gallery.confirmDelete: Delete {count, plural, one {# selected photo} other {# selected photos}}? This cannot be undone.
gallery.toastDeleted: {count, plural, one {# photo removed} other {# photos removed}}
gallery.toastDeleteFailed: Could not delete photos. Try again.

wishes.title: Guest wishes
wishes.subtitle: Remove messages from the wishes wall. Attachments are deleted from storage when present.
wishes.loadError: Could not load wishes. Try again later.
wishes.hasMoreHint: Only the most recent wishes are listed here. Delete in batches if you need to clear older items.
wishes.countSelected: {count, plural, =0 {None selected} one {# selected} other {# selected}}
wishes.confirmDelete: Delete {count, plural, one {# selected wish} other {# selected wishes}}? This cannot be undone.
wishes.toastDeleted: {count, plural, one {# wish removed} other {# wishes removed}}
wishes.toastDeleteFailed: Could not delete wishes. Try again.

emailPage.title: Email
emailPage.subtitle: Add verified sender addresses, create templates with placeholders, send a test or broadcast, and review the log. Each send is logged.
emailPage.loadError: Could not load email data. Try again later.
emailPage.sendersIntro: Each mailbox must be allowed in Resend (verified domain). Display name is optional — we format it as the visible sender name plus the mailbox address.
emailPage.confirmDeleteSender: Delete this sender? Templates using it will fall back to the default site address.
emailPage.sendIntro: Test sends one message. Broadcast uses RSVP rows with a non-empty email (segment filter + per-request cap — see docs).
emailPage.confirmDeleteTemplate: Delete this template? Past send log entries stay, but the template will be removed.

fields.name: Display name
fields.subject: Subject line (supports placeholders)
fields.templateSenderHint: Default sender for this template. You can override per send below.
fields.sendFromHint: Choose a saved sender to override the template default for this run only.

toast.sendCapped: Recipient list was larger than the per-request cap ({total} total). Only the first batch was sent — narrow the segment or raise ADMIN_EMAIL_MAX_BROADCAST_RECIPIENTS.

stubs.comingSoon: This section is not implemented yet.

featuresPage.title: Features
featuresPage.subtitle: Choose visibility for each guest-facing section: hidden, preview (teaser only), or fully enabled.
featuresPage.accessHint: Sign in at /admin/login. Saving uses your admin session cookie (or a legacy API token in scripts).

schedulePage.title: Day-of program
schedulePage.subtitle: Edit the timeline guests see on the site. Presets fill Russian and English text you can adjust.
schedulePage.accessHint: Sign in at /admin/login. Saving uses your admin session cookie (or a legacy API token in scripts).

settings.title: Site settings
settings.subtitle: Toggle guest-facing features and edit the day-of schedule. Changes apply after you save.
settings.accessHint: You must be signed in at /admin/login. Saving uses your admin session cookie (or a legacy API token in scripts).

errors.duplicateIds: Each schedule item needs a unique id.
errors.multipleEmphasis: Only one schedule item can be marked as the main moment. Turn off the extra highlight.
errors.emptySchedule: Add at least one schedule item.
errors.notSignedIn: Your session expired. Sign in again from the admin login page.
errors.rateLimited: Too many requests. Try again in {seconds, plural, one {# second} other {# seconds}}.
errors.rateLimitedGeneric: Too many requests. Please wait and try again.
errors.scheduleSaveFailed: Could not save the program. Check the form and try again.

schedule.invalidJson: The request body is not valid JSON. Reload the page and try again.
schedule.duplicateIdsInPayload: Each schedule item needs a unique id.
schedule.multipleEmphasisInPayload: Only one item can be the main moment on the timeline.
schedule.iconExclusive: Use only one icon source: built-in, hosted URL, or inline SVG — not several at once.
schedule.itemsEmpty: Add at least one schedule item.
schedule.itemsTooMany: The program cannot have more than 64 items.
schedule.hourInvalid: Hour must be a whole number from 0 to 23.
schedule.minuteInvalid: Minute must be a whole number from 0 to 59.
schedule.titleTooLong: A title is too long (max 4000 characters).
schedule.descTooLong: A description is too long (max 8000 characters).
schedule.locationTooLong: A venue label is too long (max 2000 characters).
schedule.locationUrlTooLong: A maps or venue URL is too long (max 4000 characters).
schedule.iconSvgTooLong: Inline SVG is too large after sanitization (limit applies on save).
schedule.iconUrlTooLong: The icon URL is too long (max 4000 characters).
schedule.iconPresetInvalid: Choose one of the built-in icon presets.
schedule.itemIdInvalid: Each row id must be a valid UUID (or leave blank to assign on save).
schedule.itemFieldsInvalid: Some fields are invalid. Check times, text length, and icon options.
schedule.persistenceFailed: The server could not save the program. Try again in a moment.
schedule.iconHostedNeedsUrlOrUpload: Row {row}: paste a public SVG URL or upload a file before saving.
schedule.iconInlineNeedsSvg: Row {row}: paste SVG markup or switch to another icon mode before saving.

publicContact.title: Public contact
publicContact.subtitle: Phone and email shown in the Contact section and elsewhere on the site. Guests see updates after the page cache refreshes.
publicContact.hint: Leave a field empty and save to fall back to the built-in default from the site configuration.
publicContact.phoneHint: Shown as on the public site. Clear the field to use the default number.
publicContact.emailHint: Used for mailto links. Clear the field to use the default address.

schedule.title: Day-of program
schedule.emphasisHint: Guests see a stronger timeline from this point onward. Pick one item or none.
schedule.emphasisRowAria: Set as main timeline moment: {segment} at {time}
schedule.inlineSvgPlaceholder: Paste a root svg element (open tag with xmlns is recommended).
schedule.inlineSvgNotice: Paste a complete SVG element. It is sanitized when you save.
schedule.clearHostedIcon: Remove URL and use built-in icon
schedule.uploadSvgSuccess: Icon uploaded — URL filled in. Save the program to apply.
schedule.uploadSvgInvalidFile: Choose a single .svg file up to {maxKb} KB.
schedule.uploadSvgUnauthorized: Your session expired. Sign in again.
schedule.uploadSvgFailed: Could not upload the icon. Try again.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.subtitle: If you have any questions or concerns, please reach us by phone or send an email — we’d love to hear from you.

donate.title: Gift the couple
donate.subtitle: Your presence is the best gift. But if you'd like to contribute materially, we'd be very grateful 🤍
donate.zelleCopied: Number copied! Open your banking app → Zelle
donate.zelleCopyFailed: Could not copy. Use this number:
